title: Software Engineer II, Back-end (Card Mgmt & Transaction Processing)

tailored_resume.name: Sai Manikanta Karnati
tailored_resume.summary: Software Engineer with 4+ years building scalable backend systems and APIs in Python, Java, Kotlin, and C across AWS and Kubernetes. Skilled in REST, MySQL, microservices, and payment/transaction processing. Delivered event-driven platforms with 99.99% reliability and cut production issue resolution time by 40% through strong engineering and communication.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Architected scalable backend services in Python, Java Spring Boot, and Kotlin microservices, enabling modular service-oriented architecture and independent deployments.
Engineered high-throughput event-driven systems using DynamoDB Streams, Python/Node.js Lambda, and SNS/SQS, ensuring 99.99% reliability across transaction processing workloads.
Built Python data processing pipelines and automation scripts that cut manual operational effort ~50% and improved processing efficiency for card and payment workflows.
Optimized complex SQL/MySQL queries, stored procedures, and data models across relational and NoSQL databases, improving reporting and transaction performance by 35%.
Designed and documented REST and GraphQL APIs consumed by Angular front ends, partnering on product management priorities to align delivery with business goals.
Deployed cloud-native applications on AWS (Lambda, ECS, EC2, S3, RDS, DynamoDB) and Kubernetes, integrating C-based system components and Azure services.
Implemented monitoring with Splunk and Spring Boot Actuator and drove clear written communication via Notion runbooks, reducing production issue resolution time by 40%.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed backend applications in Python, Java Spring Boot, Kotlin, and Node.js, delivering scalable REST APIs and microservices used across business systems.
Built Python automation scripts for data transformation, validation, and backend task orchestration, reducing operations overhead by ~30%.
Optimized SQL/MySQL queries, joins, views, and stored procedures, improving API response times by 35% for transaction-heavy modules.
Implemented event-driven architecture with Apache Kafka, reducing inter-service dependency failures by 35% and improving payment processing throughput.
Containerized applications with Docker and Kubernetes and automated provisioning via Terraform on AWS and GCP, improving CI/CD deployment efficiency.
Authored and documented REST APIs with Swagger/OpenAPI in Notion, enforcing versioning, backward compatibility, and clear team communication.
Applied Redis caching, OAuth2/JWT security, and SQL optimization to sustain throughput under heavy load.

experience.title: Engineer Trainee
bullets: Developed enterprise applications using Angular and Python/Java backend services, supporting transactional systems and base data models.
Built and optimized SQL/MySQL queries, stored procedures, and relational schemas for transaction processing, improving query execution time by 20%.
Developed REST APIs documented with Swagger/OpenAPI and secured them using OAuth2 and Spring Security.
Applied rate limiting and API gateway protections across backend services to harden operations.
Increased unit test coverage to 95% using JUnit and Python-based test automation, improving release reliability.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: University Of North Carolina At Charlotte

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate - AWS Academy Data Engineering
